evidence_model: product commits followed by exact detached verification and an evidence-only commit

verification_environment.cache_strategy: one shared Cargo target and generated output tree; no duplicate agents or GitHub runners

exactly_lowered: TargetsValid on exact targeted cast and cast-or-copy events
A:Regenerate as a distinct typed regeneration shield
generic Optional=True effect wrapping without moving subabilities into the choice
Hidden=True as explicit typed hidden-information metadata
closed single-player DefinedPlayer scopes for ChangeZone and library search
still_quarantined: aggregate Player scopes requiring per-player selection cardinality
any effect whose rules-observable distinction cannot be retained in typed IR
semantic_boundaries.claim: structural translation and compiler validity only; runtime and card-specific semantic maturity remain separate T3.5 and T3.6 evidence

review_history.scope: TargetsValid, Regenerate, Optional, Hidden and append-only operation compatibility

findings: aggregate Player moves collapsed per-player cardinality into one global selection
battlefield collections used ownership rather than controller scope
Targeted without a same-ability target binding failed open

review_history.finding: aggregate Opponent scopes still collapsed per-opponent cardinality in multiplayer

review_history.result: aggregate Player and Opponent scopes plus unbound Targeted values fail closed; battlefield collections use controller scope; private-zone collections use owner scope
all prior findings closed; no P0, P1, or P2 findings; product, metrics, timestamp, and provenance bindings exact

commands.result: format, clippy -D warnings, full workspace tests, deterministic translation and planner replay, compiler/database validation, 235 oracle scenarios, and coverage passed

continuation.rule: T3.5 and T3.6 remain parallel lanes and do not replace or pause measured T3.3 script translation and ability-use mapping
